customer_managed_policy_reference.description: Reference to the ARN of the customer-managed IAM policy to be attached to the specified permission set.

instance_arn.description: ARN of the AWS SSO instance to which the customer-managed policy will be attached.

permission_set_arn.description: ARN of the permission set to attach the customer-managed policy to. Must be a valid and existing permission set ARN.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration for operations to complete, such as attaching or detaching customer-managed policies, with specified timeout constraints.
